=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:7-5:14) TS377055: This class extends the native `Error` type directly. Untagged native errors lose distinction in the Effect failure channel. effect(extendsNativeError)
  Fix 0: "Disable extendsNativeError for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable extendsNativeError for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable extendsNativeError for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable extendsNativeError for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable extendsNativeError for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable extendsNativeError for entire file"
